title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 228.365 - Change of judge, venue
text:
228.365.  Change of judge, venue. — Any application for change of judge must be filed within thirty days after the answer to the petition is due or within thirty days after designation of the judge who will conduct the nonjury hearing for establishment or widening of the private road, whichever date is later.  Any application for change of venue may only be filed within ten days after exceptions to the commissioners' report are filed.
(L. 1991 S.B. 138 § 8, A.L. 1993 S.B. 236)
